headline: Jeff Bezos’ AI Startup Valued at $41 Billion in Funding Round

headline: Supreme Court Shields Investment Funds From Shareholder Lawsuits

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To BlackRock (BLK) Expanding Into Space ETFs And Digital Assets
summary: In recent days, BlackRock has expanded its thematic and digital footprint by launching the iShares Space Technologies UCITS ETF for European and UK investors, while also highlighting strong inflows into its iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF and rising interest in tokenized versions of its stock. This combination of new space-focused products and growing engagement with digital and tokenized assets underscores how BlackRock is aligning its offering with evolving investor themes across both public...
